TextView.android:text: Take: Chilli sauce, tomato sauce \n\nSuggestions: Sriracha, Soy sauce
Take: Chilli sauce, tomato sauce \n\nSuggestions: Sriracha, Soy sauce

androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatTextV.android:text: Take 1 cup(300g) of rice in a bowl and Wash and rinse it atleast thrice to remove the excess starch
